message.content:
You are reviewing a pull request for SCRN013 - Build Translator screen. This is a Raycast clone project (React 19 + TypeScript + Sass + Tauri).

The task was: Build Translator screen. Two-panel layout: source text (left/top) and translated text (right/bottom). Language selector dropdowns for source and target. Swap languages button. Auto-detect source language. Copy translation button. In web demo mode, use a simple mock translation (reverse text or placeholder). In production, integrate with translation API. Support 20+ languages. Create src/components/translator/translator_view.tsx and translator.scss. Push from "Translate" command.

## Files changed:

1. `src/data/translator_data.ts` - New file: Language data (27 languages), mock translation engine (word-swap based), language detection (Unicode ranges + pattern matching), translation history entries
2. `src/components/translator/translator_view.tsx` - New file: Main Translator screen with two-panel layout, language selector via SearchDropdown, swap button, translation history sub-view, keyboard shortcuts, HUD feedback
3. `src/components/translator/translator_view.scss` - New file: Styles for translator layout, panels, swap button, textarea, output area
4. `src/components/icons/icons.tsx` - Added TranslateIcon (blue gradient background, translate symbol)
5. `src/components/icons/index.ts` - Exported TranslateIcon
6. `src/extensions/translator/manifest.ts` - New file: Extension manifest registering "Translate" command
7. `src/extensions/index.ts` - Registered translatorExtension

## Review criteria (PROJECT_FACTS):
- Bun runtime, TypeScript strict mode, React 19, Vite 6, Sass
- No comments in code unless JSDoc needed
- No over-engineering, no abstractions for single-use cases
- Sass variables for design tokens
- Every component gets its own .scss file
- File naming: file_name.ts
- Keep components small and composable
- No workarounds (no `as any`)
- Professional quality

Read ALL changed files thoroughly and provide a detailed review covering:
1. TypeScript correctness (strict mode compliance, no `as any`, proper types)
2. React patterns (hooks usage, memoization, dependency arrays correctness)
3. SCSS patterns (BEM naming, design tokens, no hardcoded values)
4. Consistency with existing codebase patterns
5. Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard navigation)
6. Edge cases and potential bugs
7. Code quality (no dead code, no unused imports, clean structure)

Be very specific about any issues found. Include file path and line context for each issue.

content.text: I'll start by reading all the changed files thoroughly, then check existing codebase patterns for consistency.

   158→
   159→const MOCK_TRANSLATIONS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
   160→  en: {
   161→    es: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',
   162→    fr: 'Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?',
   163→    de: 'Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?',
   164→    it: 'Ciao, come stai?',
   165→    pt: 'Olá, como vai você?',
   166→    ja: 'こんにちは、お元気ですか？',
   167→    ko: '안녕하세요, 어떻게 지내세요?',
   168→    zh: '你好，你好吗？',
   169→    ru: 'Здравствуйте, как дела?',
   170→    ar: 'مرحبًا، كيف حالك؟',
   171→  },
   172→  es: {
   173→    en: 'Hello, how are you?',
   174→    fr: 'Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?',
   175→    de: 'Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?',
   176→  },
   177→  fr: {
   178→    en: 'Hello, how are you?',
   179→    es: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',

   181→  },
   182→};
   183→
   184→function simpleWordSwap(text: string, targetLang: string): string {
   185→  const words: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
   186→    es: {
   187→      hello: 'hola',
   188→      world: 'mundo',
   189→      the: 'el',
   190→      is: 'es',
   191→      a: 'un',
   192→      and: 'y',
   193→      good: 'bueno',
   194→      morning: 'mañana',
   195→      night: 'noche',
   196→      thank: 'gracias',
   197→      you: 'tú',
   198→      yes: 'sí',
   199→      no: 'no',
   200→      please: 'por favor',
   201→      sorry: 'lo siento',
   202→      love: 'amor',
   203→      water: 'agua',
   204→      food: 'comida',
   205→      time: 'tiempo',
   206→      day: 'día',
   207→    },
   208→    fr: {
   209→      hello: 'bonjour',
   210→      world: 'monde',
   211→      the: 'le',
   212→      is: 'est',
   213→      a: 'un',
   214→      and: 'et',
   215→      good: 'bon',
   216→      morning: 'matin',
   217→      night: 'nuit',
   218→      thank: 'merci',
   219→      you: 'vous',
   220→      yes: 'oui',
   221→      no: 'non',
   222→      please: "s'il vous plaît",
   223→      sorry: 'désolé',
   224→      love: 'amour',
   225→      water: 'eau',
   226→      food: 'nourriture',
   227→      time: 'temps',
   228→      day: 'jour',
   229→    },
   230→    de: {
   231→      hello: 'hallo',
   232→      world: 'Welt',
   233→      the: 'das',
   234→      is: 'ist',
   235→      a: 'ein',
   236→      and: 'und',
   237→      good: 'gut',
   238→      morning: 'Morgen',
   239→      night: 'Nacht',
   240→      thank: 'danke',
   241→      you: 'du',
   242→      yes: 'ja',
   243→      no: 'nein',
   244→      please: 'bitte',
   245→      sorry: 'Entschuldigung',
   246→      love: 'Liebe',
   247→      water: 'Wasser',
   248→      food: 'Essen',
   249→      time: 'Zeit',
   250→      day: 'Tag',
   251→    },
   252→    pt: {
   253→      hello: 'olá',
   254→      world: 'mundo',
   255→      the: 'o',
   256→      is: 'é',
   257→      a: 'um',
   258→      and: 'e',
   259→      good: 'bom',
   260→      morning: 'manhã',
   261→      night: 'noite',
   262→      thank: 'obrigado',
   263→      you: 'você',
   264→      yes: 'sim',
   265→      no: 'não',
   266→      please: 'por favor',
   267→      sorry: 'desculpe',
   268→      love: 'amor',
   269→      water: 'água',
   270→      food: 'comida',
   271→      time: 'tempo',
   272→      day: 'dia',
   273→    },
   274→    ja: {
   275→      hello: 'こんにちは',
   276→      world: '世界',
   277→      the: '',
   278→      is: 'です',
   279→      a: '',
   280→      and: 'と',
   281→      good: '良い',
   282→      morning: '朝',
   283→      night: '夜',
   284→      thank: 'ありがとう',
   285→      you: 'あなた',
   286→      yes: 'はい',
   287→      no: 'いいえ',
   288→    },
   289→    it: {
   290→      hello: 'ciao',
   291→      world: 'mondo',
   292→      the: 'il',
   293→      is: 'è',
   294→      a: 'un',
   295→      and: 'e',
   296→      good: 'buono',
   297→      morning: 'mattina',
   298→      night: 'notte',
   299→      thank: 'grazie',
   300→      you: 'tu',
   301→      yes: 'sì',
   302→      no: 'no',
   303→    },
   304→  };
   305→
   306→  const dict = words[targetLang];
   307→  if (!dict) return `[${targetLang}] ${text}`;
   308→
   309→  return text
   310→    .split(/(\s+)/)
   311→    .map(token => {
   312→      const lower = token.toLowerCase();
   313→      const replacement = dict[lower];
   314→      if (replacement !== undefined) {
   315→        if (token[0] === token[0]?.toUpperCase() && replacement.length > 0) {
   316→          return replacement[0]!.toUpperCase() + replacement.slice(1);
   317→        }
   318→        return replacement;
   319→      }
   320→      return token;
   321→    })
   322→    .join('');
   323→}
   324→
   325→function detectLanguage(text: string): string {
   326→  const trimmed = text.trim();
   327→  if (!trimmed) return 'en';
   328→
   329→  if (/[\u3040-\u309F\u30A0-\u30FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ja';
   330→  if (/[\uAC00-\uD7AF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ko';
   331→  if (/[\u4E00-\u9FFF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'zh';
   332→  if (/[\u0400-\u04FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ru';
   333→  if (/[\u0600-\u06FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ar';
   334→  if (/[\u0900-\u097F]/.test(trimmed)) return 'hi';
   335→  if (/[\u0E00-\u0E7F]/.test(trimmed)) return 'th';
   336→
   337→  const spanishPatterns =
   338→    /\b(el|la|los|las|de|en|que|es|un|una|con|por|para)\b/i;
   339→  const frenchPatterns = /\b(le|la|les|des|un|une|est|et|en|que|dans|pour)\b/i;
   340→  const germanPatterns = /\b(der|die|das|ein|eine|und|ist|von|mit|auf|für)\b/i;
   341→  const portuguesePatterns = /\b(o|a|os|as|de|em|que|é|um|uma|com|para)\b/i;
   342→
   343→  const scores: {
   344→    lang: string;
   345→    count: number;
   346→  }[] = [
   347→    {
   348→      lang: 'es',
   349→      count: (trimmed.match(spanishPatterns) || []).length,
   350→    },
   351→    {
   352→      lang: 'fr',
   353→      count: (trimmed.match(frenchPatterns) || []).length,
   354→    },
   355→    {
   356→      lang: 'de',
   357→      count: (trimmed.match(germanPatterns) || []).length,
   358→    },
   359→    {
   360→      lang: 'pt',
   361→      count: (trimmed.match(portuguesePatterns) || []).length,
   362→    },
   363→  ];
   364→
   365→  scores.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
   366→  const best = scores[0];
   367→  if (best && best.count > 0) return best.lang;
   368→
   369→  return 'en';
   370→}
   371→
   372→export function mockTranslate(
   373→  text: string,
   374→  sourceLang: string,
   375→  targetLang: string,
   376→): {
   377→  translated: string;
   378→  detectedLang?: string;
   379→} {
   380→  if (!text.trim()) return { translated: '' };
   381→
   382→  let effectiveSource = sourceLang;
   383→  let detectedLang: string | undefined;
   384→
   385→  if (sourceLang === 'auto') {
   386→    effectiveSource = detectLanguage(text);
   387→    detectedLang = effectiveSource;
   388→  }
   389→
   390→  if (effectiveSource === targetLang) {
   391→    return {
   392→      translated: text,
   393→      detectedLang,
   394→    };
   395→  }
   396→
   397→  const knownTranslation = MOCK_TRANSLATIONS[effectiveSource]?.[targetLang];
   398→  if (knownTranslation && text.trim().toLowerCase() === 'hello, how are you?') {
   399→    return {
   400→      translated: knownTranslation,
   401→      detectedLang,
   402→    };
   403→  }
   404→
   405→  const swapped = simpleWordSwap(text, targetLang);
   406→  if (swapped !== `[${targetLang}] ${text}`) {
   407→    return {
   408→      translated: swapped,
   409→      detectedLang,
   410→    };
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  return {
   414→    translated: swapped,
   415→    detectedLang,
   416→  };
   417→}
   418→
   419→export const MOCK_HISTORY: TranslationHistoryEntry[] = [
   420→  {
   421→    id: 'th-1',
   422→    sourceText: 'Hello, how are you?',
   423→    translatedText: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',
   424→    sourceLang: 'en',
   425→    targetLang: 'es',
   426→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 30),
   427→  },
   428→  {
   429→    id: 'th-2',
   430→    sourceText: 'Good morning world',
   431→    translatedText: 'Bonjour monde',
   432→    sourceLang: 'en',
   433→    targetLang: 'fr',
   434→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 2),
   435→  },
   436→  {
   437→    id: 'th-3',
   438→    sourceText: 'Thank you very much',
   439→    translatedText: 'Vielen Danke sehr viel',
   440→    sourceLang: 'en',
   441→    targetLang: 'de',
   442→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 5),
   443→  },
   444→  {
   445→    id: 'th-4',
   446→    sourceText: 'The water is good',
   447→    translatedText: 'A água é bom',
   448→    sourceLang: 'en',
   449→    targetLang: 'pt',
   450→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
   451→  },
   452→  {
   453→    id: 'th-5',
   454→    sourceText: 'Please and thank you',
   455→    translatedText: 'Per favore e grazie',
   456→    sourceLang: 'en',
   457→    targetLang: 'it',
   458→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 48),
   459→  },
   460→];
   461→

1→import { type IconProps } from './icon_shared';

     7→  return {
     8→    width: s,
     9→    height: s,
    10→    viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    11→    xmlns: 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',

   140→export function WindowIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
   141→  return (
   142→    <svg {...svgBase(props)}>
   143→      <defs>
   144→        <linearGradient id="window-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
   145→          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#64D2FF" />
   146→          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#0A84FF" />
